heroTagline: Angular 21 production-ready template. SSR · PWA · i18n · WCAG AA · Bootstrap 5.
markdownLabDesc: Write Markdown and view real-time HTML preview.
markdownShortcutHint: Press Ctrl+Enter to update the preview.
actionDemoText: Example text for copying and sharing.
accessibilityDesc: Colors are calculated with color-mix() and comply with WCAG 2.1 AA.
i18nDesc: Translations are loaded from local JSON files.
internalsApiDesc: Communication with the ASP.NET Core backend.
assetResolverDesc: Resolves an image ID via AssetService with optional WebP resize.
imgBuilderDesc: Create images with custom text using HTML5 canvas.
modalDemoDesc: Async alert, confirm and prompt via NotificationService. Reusable anywhere.
modalAlertBody: This is a sample informational message.
modalConfirmBody: This action cannot be undone. Do you want to proceed?
speechDemoDesc: Built-in SpeechService: speak, stop, detect the active system voice.
speechPlaceholder: Write something to be read aloud...
siteDesc: Base template to showcase core functionalities
homeDesc: Interactive demo of Angular 21 template features
githubDesc: View the source code on GitHub
qrCodeDesc: Generate QR codes for text, links, WhatsApp, email, Wi-Fi and SEPA payments. Automatic theme colors with guaranteed WCAG contrast.
actionComponentsDesc: Reusable components split into three families: actions (copy, share, speech, download, print, PDF), contacts (email, phone, WhatsApp, Telegram) and navigation (social). Each one handles its own service and labels: you only pass a function or a config.
